Name: sparse_kernel_opt
Title: Hardware-Aware Sparse Neural Network Kernels for Commodity GPUs
Short Hypothesis: By optimizing CUDA kernels for sparse neural networks and leveraging hardware-aware heuristics, we can achieve significant speedups on commodity GPUs without sacrificing accuracy.
Related Work: Existing work on sparse neural networks has focused on theoretical guarantees and software-level optimizations. In contrast, our proposal focuses on hardware-aware kernel optimizations, which have been shown to be crucial for achieving high performance on commodity GPUs.
Abstract: We propose a novel approach to optimizing sparse neural networks on commodity GPUs. By leveraging hardware-aware heuristics and optimizing CUDA kernels, we can achieve significant speedups without sacrificing accuracy. Our approach will be evaluated using reproducible benchmarks and nvprof/Nsight traces.
Experiments: Optimize CUDA kernels for sparse neural networks using hardware-aware heuristics
Evaluate the performance of our optimized kernels on a range of sparse neural network architectures and datasets
Compare our approach to existing software-level optimizations
Risk Factors and Limitations: Limited generalizability to all sparse neural network architectures and datasets
Requires access to commodity GPUs and specialized hardware
